summary: S&P 500 +0.54%, Nasdaq +0.69% (record 25,114), Dow +0.37%, Russell 2000 +2.21%. Apple beat earnings, up ~5%. Oil eased on US-Iran peace deal hopes. April was best month for S&P 500 and Nasdaq since 2020.
